replies.msg:
我開咗 一個 excel file , file name 係 "ABC.xls"
之後我會喺 "ABC.xls" 行一個 personal macro

咁個macro 嘅內容 係會 開某個folder 嘅excel , 叫 "XYZ.xlsm" 再行入面嘅 macro. 到目前都so far so good 嘅。

但我想paste "XYZ.xlsm" 嘅 某個Column data 入 去"ABC.xls" by VBA. 但都係會paste 返去 "XYZ.xlsm".

請問我可以點樣activate 返 "ABC.xls" 呢個workbook?

Ps: 我嘗試過用 thiswoorkbook.select
但就係 personal.xlbs

replies.msg:
Workbook(“your name.xlsx”).activate 之類
呢個自己Google 啦 vba 面世咁多年大部分常見command 其實都有哂

同埋最緊要識自己錄

quote.msg:
我開咗 一個 excel file , file name 係 "ABC.xls"
之後我會喺 "ABC.xls" 行一個 personal macro

咁個macro 嘅內容 係會 開某個folder 嘅excel , 叫 "XYZ.xlsm" 再行入面嘅 macro. 到目前都so far so good 嘅。

但我想paste "XYZ.xlsm" 嘅 某個Column data 入 去"ABC.xls" by VBA. 但都係會paste 返去 "XYZ.xlsm".

請問我可以點樣activate 返 "ABC.xls" 呢個workbook?

Ps: 我嘗試過用 thiswoorkbook.select
但就係 personal.xlbs

replies.msg: 開完xyz.xlsm即刻下一句就define set wbxyz=activeworkbook就應該ok

best practice 係
dim wb as workbook dim newWb as workbook set wb = thisworkbook set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls") wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

quote.msg:
best practice 係
dim wb as workbook dim newWb as workbook set wb = thisworkbook set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls") wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

replies.msg:
dim wb as workbook
dim newWb as workbook

set wb = thisworkbook
set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls")
wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

quote.msg:
best practice 係
dim wb as workbook dim newWb as workbook set wb = thisworkbook set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls") wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

dim wb as workbook
dim newWb as workbook

set wb = thisworkbook
set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls")
wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

replies.msg:
我將個code 改做

Set wb = activeworkbook

最後搞掂咗 , 多謝巴打

quote.msg:
我開咗 一個 excel file , file name 係 "ABC.xls"
之後我會喺 "ABC.xls" 行一個 personal macro

咁個macro 嘅內容 係會 開某個folder 嘅excel , 叫 "XYZ.xlsm" 再行入面嘅 macro. 到目前都so far so good 嘅。

但我想paste "XYZ.xlsm" 嘅 某個Column data 入 去"ABC.xls" by VBA. 但都係會paste 返去 "XYZ.xlsm".

請問我可以點樣activate 返 "ABC.xls" 呢個workbook?

Ps: 我嘗試過用 thiswoorkbook.select
但就係 personal.xlbs

best practice 係
dim wb as workbook dim newWb as workbook set wb = thisworkbook set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls") wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

dim wb as workbook
dim newWb as workbook

set wb = thisworkbook
set newWb = workbooks.Open("path\ABC.xls")
wb.Cells(1, 1).Copy Destination:= newWb.Cells(1, 1)

我將個code 改做

Set wb = activeworkbook

最後搞掂咗 , 多謝巴打

replies.msg:
normally我唔建議 set activeworkbook, 因為係你依家當前activate果本workbook,但你run緊果陣好難睇邊個activate
不如用set newwb= workbooks.open(名)咁樣仲好直接指名道姓,就避開不必要既bug
